Metadata.SourceFile: International Karate (Now Games 5 - Pack of Aces) (Side 1).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0895 "INTERNATIONALKARATE-SIDE2-0895" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "International Karate (Side 2).prg"
